title: Protocol for T7 Exonuclease (NEB #M0263)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"75skj","text":"T7 Exonuclease efficiently degrades nicked and linear dsDNA (with blunt or 3' overhangs) from 5' to 3' direction, leaving supercoiled dsDNA inctact.*","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fr31j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2535b","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"j3qt","text":"*Note: For more precise results or partial digestions, we recommend titration of the enzyme to the intended substrate.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"2v2sn","text":"Please see SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for hazards and safety warnings.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Stop reaction by adding EDTA to at least 11 millimolar (mM) .

To clean up treated samples, we recommend using one of the following steps : a. Column clean up (we recommend the Monarch® PCR & DNA Cleanup Kit, NEB #T1030 ) or b. Running the reaction on an agarose gel, and then extracting the DNA (we recommend the Monarch Gel Extraction Kit, NEB #T1020 ), or c. Performing a phenol/chloroform extraction followed by ethanol precipitation.
creator: New England Biolabs Tech Support
